The residence

Ninon

A second-floor two-bedroom residence of almost 150 square metres gross in the village heart of Green Coast, Palasë. A broad living room anchors the plan, with two proper bedrooms and the resort's promenades, pools and Blue Flag beach below.

Explore the residence

Walk it, room by room

Tap any room on the plan to see its size.

Position within Green Coast

Where Ninon sits

Ninon sits just east of the central plaza, where the village's main lanes meet — close to everything the resort keeps at its centre. The hotel is a short walk north, the parking entrance to the west, and the paths down to the beach begin at the village edge.

Location & setting

Life at Green Coast

Green Coast is the Albanian Riviera's most established resort address — a stone-built village above the Blue Flag beach at Palasë, where the Ceraunian mountains meet the Ionian. Mediterranean architecture in local stone, travertine and timber; promenades, pools, restaurants and a beach club below; the life of the coast a few steps from the door.

Just east of the central plaza, where the lanes meet
